item.title: [Segurança] CISA Warns Critical Lantronix EDS5000 Flaw Is Being Actively Exploited
item.description:
🚨 CISA Warns Critical Lantronix EDS5000 Flaw Is Being Actively Exploited
 
Criticidade: Crítica
Ferramenta: Qualys
Fonte: The Hacker News
CVSS: 9.8
Resumo:
Cybersecurity and Infrastructure Security Agency (CISA) on Tuesday warned of active exploitation of a critical security flaw impacting Lantronix EDS5000 Series devices, urging Federal Civilian Executive Branch (FCEB) agencies to apply the fixes by June 26, 2026. The vulnerability in question is CVE-2025-67038 (CVSS score: 9.8), a code injection flaw that could result in the execution
Link: https://thehackernews.com/2026/06/cisa-warns-critical-lantronix-eds5000.html

item.title: [Segurança] Cisco Catalyst SD-WAN Zero-Day CVE-2026-20245 Exploited to Gain Root Access
item.description:
🚨 Cisco Catalyst SD-WAN Zero-Day CVE-2026-20245 Exploited to Gain Root Access
 
Criticidade: Alta
Ferramenta: Qualys
Fonte: The Hacker News
CVSS: 7.8
Resumo:
An unknown threat actor exploited a recently disclosed high-severity security flaw impacting Cisco Catalyst SD-WAN as a zero-day at least two months before it was publicly disclosed, according to new findings from Google-owned Mandiant. The vulnerability, tracked as CVE-2026-20245 (CVSS score: 7.8), allows an authenticated, local attacker to execute arbitrary commands with elevated privileges
Link: https://thehackernews.com/2026/06/cisco-catalyst-sd-wan-zero-day-cve-2026.html

item.title: [Segurança] Critical CVE-2026-39118 Vulnerability in macOS Allows Users to Disable Kandji MDM and CrowdStrike EDR Security Agents - Rescana
item.description:
🚨 Critical CVE-2026-39118 Vulnerability in macOS Allows Users to Disable Kandji MDM and CrowdStrike EDR Security Agents - Rescana
 
Criticidade: Alta
Ferramenta: SentinelOne
Fonte: Google News RSS
CVSS: N/D
Resumo:
A publicação relata a vulnerabilidade CVE-2026-39118 associada a SentinelOne. Vale consultar o link para verificar impacto, versões afetadas e orientações de correção.
Link: https://news.google.?oc=5

item.title: [Sistemas / Cloud] CVE-2026-52844 - Windows Server
item.description:
🚨 CVE-2026-52844 - Windows Server
 
Criticidade: Alta
Ferramenta: Windows Server
Fonte: NVD
CVSS: 7.5
Resumo:
Caddy is an extensible server platform that uses TLS by default. Prior to 2.11.4, on Windows, Caddy path matchers treat /private\secret.txt as outside /private/*, but file_server later resolves the same request path as private\secret.txt on disk. An unauthenticated remote client can bypass Caddy path-scoped auth/deny routes protecting /private/*.
Link: https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2026-52844

item.title: [Sistemas / Cloud] CVE-2026-52961 - Ubuntu
item.description:
🚨 CVE-2026-52961 - Ubuntu
 
Criticidade: Média
Ferramenta: Ubuntu
Fonte: NVD
CVSS: N/D
Resumo:
In the Linux kernel, the following vulnerability has been resolved: ceph: fix BUG_ON in __ceph_build_xattrs_blob() due to stale blob size The generic/642 test-case can reproduce the kernel crash: [40243.605254] ------------[ cut here ]------------ [40243.605956] kernel BUG at fs/ceph/xattr.c:918! [40243.607142] Oops: invalid opcode: 0000 [#1] SMP PTI [40243.608067] CPU: 7 UID: 0 PID: 498762 Comm: kworker/7:1 Not tain...
Link: https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2026-52961

item.title: [Sistemas / Cloud] CVE-2026-11614 - WordPress
item.description:
🚨 CVE-2026-11614 - WordPress
 
Criticidade: Média
Ferramenta: WordPress
Fonte: NVD
CVSS: 6.4
Resumo:
The Xpro Addons — 140+ Widgets for Elementor plugin for WordPress is vulnerable to Stored Cross-Site Scripting via the 'custom_attributes' parameter in all versions up to, and including, 1.7.2 due to insufficient input sanitization and output escaping. This makes it possible for authenticated attackers, with author-level access and above, to inject arbitrary web scripts in pages that will execute whenever a user acce...
Link: https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2026-11614

item.title: [Infraestrutura] Diagnostics Log Assist for Broadcom Cases
item.description:
📰 Diagnostics Log Assist for Broadcom Cases
 
Criticidade: Crítica
Ferramenta: ESX
Fonte: https://blogs.vmware.com/feed
CVSS: 9.1
Resumo:
In VMware Cloud Foundation Operations 9.1, the Log Assist feature supports all core and management layers of VMware Cloud Foundation (VCF). Diagnostics Log Assist streamlines support by automatically collecting, bundling, and transferring logs to Broadcom for troubleshooting. It significantly cuts down manual effort and speeds up log transfer (often 30-40% faster), while providing a secure, …
Link: https://blogs.vmware.com/cloud-foundation/2026/06/24/diagnostics-log-assist-for-broadcom-cases/

item.title: [Segurança] Malicious Edge extension abuses Native Messaging as bridge to malware
item.description:
📰 Malicious Edge extension abuses Native Messaging as bridge to malware
 
Criticidade: Alta
Ferramenta: SentinelOne
Fonte: BleepingComputer
CVSS: N/D
Resumo:
A malicious Microsoft Edge extension dubbed 'Edgecution' has been used in a ransomware attack to escape the browser sandbox and deploy a Python-based backdoor.
Link: https://www.bleepingcomputer.com/news/security/malicious-edge-extension-abuses-native-messaging-as-bridge-to-malware/
